metadata.name: Create a Monthly Content Performance Report

description: A content marketer needs to report on the performance of the company blog from the last month.

nodes.task_description: In Google Analytics, filter for traffic to the '/blog/' section of the website for the last month.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent isolates the data for the blog.

nodes.task_description: Identify the top 5 most-viewed blog posts for the month.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of the top-performing content.

nodes.task_description: Report on key metrics for the blog as a whole, such as total users, average time on page, and top traffic sources.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a summary report of the blog's overall performance.
